description.value: Price 20,000 gp; Slot eyes or none; CL 11th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura moderate divination BENEFITS This telescope is adjustable as a full-round action, allowing magnifications anywhere from Ã2 to Ã250. The user gains a +5 competence bonus on Knowledge (geography) and Perception checks when using the device to study planets, stars, and other celestial bodies. As a full-round action, the user can press the two lenses together, compressing the device to a small assayerâs lens small enough to occupy the eyes slot. In this form, the lens grants a +5 competence bonus on Appraise checks, Perception checks, and Survival checks to follow tracks. Once per week, after studying the possessions or tracks of a creature, the wearer may designate that creature as his quarry. This functions as the ranger âs quarry ability. If the wearer already has the quarry ability, the lens instead allows him to designate a creature as his quarry even if it is not one of his favored enemies. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 10,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells clairaudience/clairvoyance, true seeing
